emails.theme: 4th of July Sale: 20% Off All Orders (America's 250th)
emails.product: Best sellers (men + women): Classic Regular Brief, Maximum Full Cut Panty, Maximum Briefs, Maximum H-Fly Boxer Brief, Super Full Cut Panty, Cotton Comfort Panty
emails.shortDescription: 4th of July weekend sale announcement. 20% off all orders Fri July 3 morning through Sun July 5 night. America's 250th, proudly American, US flag banner. 6 best sellers in a grid, each with its own Shop Now.
emails.notes: Offer mechanism shown as auto-discount no code (matches prior 2026 sales) - confirm before send. New absorbency verbiage used. No pricing, no SKUs, not overnight.
emails.offerCode: 20% off all orders, auto at checkout (no code). Fri-Sun. Cannot be combined.
emails.creativeDirection: Patriotic flag hero + bold 20% OFF block, 2-col best-seller grid (6, men+women, varied colors), proudly American trust strip. Navy/red/white.

emails.theme: 4th of July Sale Last Call: 20% Off Ends Tonight
emails.product: Full Coverage Regular Trunk Boxer Brief, Regular 2-in-1 Boxer, Nylon Panty With Lace Sides, Cotton Comfort Panty (each with a real customer review)
emails.shortDescription: Final hours of the America's 250th weekend sale. 20% off ends Sun July 5, 11:59 PM. Stacked review cards with real verified customer reviews per product. Distinct layout from the Jul 3 announcement.
emails.notes: Real reviews pulled from product pages (no overnight quotes used). Confirm offer is auto-discount no code. No pricing, no SKUs.
emails.offerCode: 20% off all orders, auto at checkout (no code). Ends Sun 11:59 PM. Cannot be combined.
